case_title: CHARLES SCHWAB & CO INC. VS COX NEVA et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SILVA CLAUDETTE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,339.18 FILED BY CHARLES SCHWAB & CO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT COX NEVA SILVA CLAUDETTE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-06-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 07

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHARLES SCHWAB & CO INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COX NEVA SILVA CLAUDETTE $1,339.18 PRINCIPAL, $54.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,393.18 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SANTA CLARA COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT COX NEVA SILVA CLAUDETTE
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT COX NEVA SILVA CLAUDETTE
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SANTA CLARA COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $1,130.56 AS TO DEFENDANT COX NEVA SILVA CLAUDETTE
